dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8252 IH: Gas Tax Reduction Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Kiley of California introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To amend title 23, United States Code, to provide for withholding of funds for noncompliance with State gas tax restriction, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Gas Tax Reduction Act.

section.header: Withholding of funds for noncompliance with State gas tax restriction

subsection.text: Chapter 1 of title 23, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

section.header: Withholding of funds for noncompliance with State gas tax restriction
section.text: The Secretary shall withhold 8 per centum of the amount required to be apportioned to any State under each of paragraphs (1) and (2) of section 104(b) on the first day of each fiscal year after the first fiscal year beginning after the date of enactment of this section in which the tax for gasoline in such State is equal to or greater than $0.50 per gallon.

subsection.text: The table of sections for chapter 1 of title 23, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

toc.toc-entry: 180. Withholding of funds for noncompliance with State gas tax restriction.
